name: Hot and Sour Garlic Chive Soup with Tofu
recipeIngredient: 3 Romaine lettuce or Swiss Chard leaves - torn into pieces
4 Dried cloud ear or shiitake mushrooms
1 6-inch piece dried arame, dulse, or tombu seaweed (package)
1 small Fresh or dried hot red pepper
1/2 lb Firm tofu, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
2 tbsp Rice or barley miso sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy pot, combine all ingredients above the line.
2. Bring to a boil, then cover and lower the heat to medium-low.
3. Simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Remove the mushrooms and slice thinly, discarding tough portions.
5. Strain the broth and return it to the pan.
6. Add the tofu and mushrooms, simmering for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Dissolve the miso in a small amount of broth, stir into the soup, then remove from heat.
8. Garnish with minced garlic chive leaves and serve immediately.
